notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Luke Raley batting, Josh Naylor picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kody Clemens reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Cole Young. Josh Bell to 2nd. Josh Bell advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Cole Young.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver pops out to shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Mitch Garver pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mitch Garver flies out to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Leo Rivas plunked
notableEvents.detail: Leo Rivas hit by pitch. Cole Young to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
